headline: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Lowers Price Target to $215
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Bascome Majors   maintains C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) with a Positive and lowers the price target from $220 to $215.
